mapper.select: SELECT ur.user_code, ur.notice_no, ur.read_status, ur.read_time, ur.create_time, n.user_code sender, n.title FROM msg_user_record ur INNER JOIN msg_notification n ON n.notice_no = ur.notice_no WHERE ur.`status` = 1 AND n.`status` = 1 AND ur.user_code = #{userCode} AND ur.create_time >= #{timeFrom} AND ur.create_time <= #{timeTo} AND ur.user_code = #{userCode} AND ur.notice_no = #{noticeNo} AND ur.read_status = #{readStatus} AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') ORDER BY ur.id DESC LIMIT #{size}

SELECT ur.user_code, ur.notice_no, ur.read_status, ur.read_time, ur.create_time, n.user_code sender, n.title FROM msg_user_record ur INNER JOIN msg_notification n ON n.notice_no = ur.notice_no WHERE ur.`status` = 1 AND n.`status` = 1 AND ur.user_code = #{userCode} AND ur.create_time >= #{timeFrom} AND ur.create_time <= #{timeTo} AND ur.user_code = #{userCode} AND ur.notice_no = #{noticeNo} AND ur.read_status = #{readStatus} AND n.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') ORDER BY ur.id DESC

SELECT ur.id, ur.user_code, ur.notice_no, ur.read_status, ur.read_time, ur.create_time, n.user_code sender, n.title, n.content, n.ext_url FROM msg_user_record ur INNER JOIN msg_notification n ON n.notice_no = ur.notice_no WHERE ur.`status` = 1 AND n.`status` = 1 AND ur.user_code = #{userCode} AND ur.notice_no = #{noticeNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE msg_user_record SET read_status = 1, show_times = show_times + 1, read_time = IFNULL(read_time, NOW()) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE msg_user_record SET read_status = 1 WHERE `status` = 1 AND id IN ( #{item} ) AND user_code = #{userCode}
